    Description
    final class 
    DataFlowGraph<S extends Enum<S> & FlowState>
    Bipartite graph of data types and processors/guards derived from a FlowDefinition.
    final class 
    FlowDefinition<S extends Enum<S> & FlowState>
    Immutable flow definition built via DSL.

    FlowDefinition.Builder<S extends Enum<S> & FlowState>
     
    static final record 
    FlowDefinition.BuildResult<S extends Enum<S> & FlowState>
    Result of FlowDefinition.Builder.buildAndValidate(): definition (if valid) + structured errors.
    final class 
    FlowInstance<S extends Enum<S> & FlowState>
    Runtime state of a flow execution.
    final record 
    Transition<S extends Enum<S> & FlowState>
    A single transition in a flow definition.
